page = <Page url='https://d1lifbniuc73oj.cloudfront.net/auth/login'>

    def test_all_defined_routes_render_correct_layout(page: Page) -> None:
        """
        Verify all major application routes render
        the correct layout components.
        """
    
        # ------------------------------------------------------------------
        # STEP 1:
        # Verify authenticated route "/" renders DashboardLayout
        # ------------------------------------------------------------------
    
        login(page)
    
        # Verify sidebar navigation buttons are visible
        expect(
            page.get_by_role("complementary")
            .get_by_role("button", name="Orders", exact=True)
        ).to_be_visible()
    
        expect(
            page.get_by_role("button", name="Business", exact=True)
        ).to_be_visible()
    
        expect(
            page.get_by_role("button", name="Returns")
        ).to_be_visible()
    
        expect(
            page.get_by_role("button", name="Inventory")
        ).to_be_visible()
    
        # Verify Header is visible
        expect(
            page.get_by_role("button", name="Sign out")
        ).to_be_visible()
    
    
        # ------------------------------------------------------------------
        # STEP 2:
        # Verify unauthenticated route "/auth/login"
        # renders AuthLayout
        # ------------------------------------------------------------------
    
        # Logout from application
        page.get_by_role("button", name="Sign out").click()
    
        page.get_by_role("dialog").get_by_role(
            "button",
            name="Sign out"
        ).click()
    
        # Verify login page rendered
        expect(
            page.get_by_role("textbox", name="User ID")
        ).to_be_visible()
    
        expect(
            page.get_by_role("textbox", name="Password")
        ).to_be_visible()
    
        expect(
            page.get_by_role("button", name="Login")
        ).to_be_visible()
    
        # Verify Sidebar is NOT visible in AuthLayout
        expect(
            page.get_by_role("button", name="Orders", exact=True)
        ).not_to_be_visible()
    
        # Verify Tab system is NOT visible
        expect(
            page.locator("[role='tab']")
        ).to_have_count(0)
    
        # ------------------------------------------------------------------
        # STEP 3:
        # Verify "/icons" page renders successfully
        # ------------------------------------------------------------------
        page.goto(f"{BASE_URL}/icons")
